title: Importer
subtitle: A simple search path based auto-importer.

members.name: FileImporter
members.description: An Importer for local source files.

members.name: addSearchPath
members.description: Add a search path to the auto importer. Relative paths are made absolute before adding.

members.name: autoImportingForward
members.description: A forward method implementation placed in the Lobby when Importing is turned on.

members.name: import
members.description: Imports an object or addon for the given Message.

members.name: paths
members.description: List of paths the proto importer will check while searching for protos to load.

members.name: removeSearchPath
members.description: Removes a search path from the auto importer. Relative paths should be removed from the same working directory as they were added.

members.name: turnOff
members.description: Turns off the Importer. Returns self.

members.name: turnOn
members.description: Turns on the Importer. Returns self.
